editable_fields.description: Does the edited image follow the instruction? Select one.

enum_values.label: Success
enum_values.description: Edit fully and correctly follows the instruction.

enum_values.label: Partial
enum_values.description: Edit follows instruction but has issues, incomplete coverage, or minor errors.

enum_values.label: No
enum_values.description: Edit does not follow instruction, is completely wrong, or failed.

editable_fields.description: Select all error types that appear in the edited image (leave empty if Success).

enum_values.label: Wrong Object
enum_values.description: Wrong object was edited or replaced with the wrong object.

enum_values.label: Missing Object
enum_values.description: Object that should have been added or edited is missing.

enum_values.label: Wrong Attribute
enum_values.description: Color, shape, size, pose, or style attribute is incorrect.

enum_values.label: Spatial Error
enum_values.description: Object placement, orientation, or spatial arrangement is wrong.

enum_values.label: Style Mismatch
enum_values.description: Edit style (artistic, lighting, texture) doesn't match the original scene.

enum_values.label: Over-editing
enum_values.description: More changes were made than the instruction requested.

enum_values.label: Under-editing
enum_values.description: Changes are incomplete or too subtle for what was requested.

enum_values.label: Artifact / Quality Issue
enum_values.description: Visual artifacts, blur, distortion, color shift, or quality degradation.

enum_values.label: Ambiguous Prompt
enum_values.description: The instruction itself is unclear or contradictory.

enum_values.label: Failed Removal
enum_values.description: Object that should be removed is still present.

editable_fields.description: Optional explanation of your changes or observations.
editable_fields.placeholder: e.g., 'Judge said No but edit mostly follows instruction. Man has suit but off-center.'

final_adherence.message: Adherence must be Success, Partial, or No.

final_taxonomy.message: Each error type can only be selected once.

notes.message: Notes must be 500 characters or fewer.

submission_format.reviewer_id: string (HF username or custom ID, auto-filled)
submission_format.action_type: string (auto-set: 'corrected' if change, 'approved' if no change)
